hero.title: Who we are
hero.description: RunGoMX brings together event pages, registrations, official results, rankings, and support so runners always know where to go next.

story.eyebrow: What you can do here today
story.title: A running platform should make the important things easy to verify
story.description: RunGoMX is built around the public pages people actually use before and after race day.
story.paragraph1: That includes finding events, checking registration details, reviewing official results, following rankings, and getting practical help before signing in.
story.paragraph2: Our job is to make it easy for runners and organizers to move between the pages that matter most: event pages, results, rankings, and support.
story.cardTitle: What visitors can do on RunGoMX

highlights.eventDiscovery: Explore public event listings and live event pages.
highlights.registrationContext: Check registration status, payment context, and organizer-published event details.
highlights.officialResults: Review official results tied to published race outcomes.
highlights.rankings: Follow rankings built from published results.
highlights.helpAndTrust: Reach support, privacy, and terms when you need more context.

focus.title: RunGoMX helps runners move from interest to proof
focus.description: Each public page should make the next step obvious instead of pushing people into sign-in too early.

discover.title: Discover events
discover.description: Visitors can start with the event directory and event pages to see what is happening, when it happens, and whether registration is open.

follow.title: Follow official outcomes
follow.description: Published results and rankings give runners a public place to confirm official outcomes and compare where they stand.

support.title: Get practical support
support.description: Help, contact, privacy, and terms give people a clear path when they need policy details or support with a real event or registration.

proof.title: The strongest proof lives on real public pages
proof.description: RunGoMX feels most credible when it points people to real event pages, official results, and rankings instead of broad promises.

events.title: Event pages and discovery
events.description: The events area is the public starting point for browsing races, reviewing editions, and opening a specific event page.

registration.title: Registration and payment context
registration.description: Public event pages show registration status and key participation details before a runner moves into account-based steps.

results.title: Official results
results.description: Results pages publish official outcomes and make it easy to verify them.

rankings.title: Rankings connected to results
rankings.description: Rankings stay tied to published results, so they feel like part of the product, not a disconnected claim.

relatedLinks.title: Go where the proof already lives
relatedLinks.description: These routes show what RunGoMX supports today better than any broad platform claim.

events.title: Browse events
events.description: Open the public event directory and continue into live event pages.

results.title: Review official results
results.description: Check published results and confirm the official outcome for a race.

rankings.title: See rankings
rankings.description: Follow rankings that update from published results.

contact.title: Contact the team
contact.description: Reach the team when you need help with an event, account, or public-site issue.

cta.title: Need a place to start?
cta.description: Browse events if you are exploring the platform, or contact the team if your question is tied to a real event or registration.
